advisories.content_en: Scout thrice weekly for PBW eggs; maintain ETL of 5-10% damaged fruiting bodies.
advisories.content_mr: Scout thrice weekly for PBW eggs; maintain ETL of 5-10% damaged fruiting bodies.
advisories.source: ICAR-CICR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Critical irrigation at flowering and pod filling if dry spell exceeds 10 days.
advisories.content_mr: Critical irrigation at flowering and pod filling if dry spell exceeds 10 days.
advisories.source: ICAR-IISR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Mrig bahar preferred in low rainfall zones; regulate irrigation 45 days before bahar.
advisories.content_mr: Mrig bahar preferred in low rainfall zones; regulate irrigation 45 days before bahar.
advisories.source: ICAR-NRCP
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Cure bulbs 10-15 days; store ventilated; avoid rain-wet harvest.
advisories.content_mr: Cure bulbs 10-15 days; store ventilated; avoid rain-wet harvest.
advisories.source: ICAR-DOGR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: High humidity + cloudy weather favors blast; avoid excess N top-dress.
advisories.content_mr: High humidity + cloudy weather favors blast; avoid excess N top-dress.
advisories.source: ICAR-NRRI
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: First irrigation at Crown Root Initiation ~20-25 DAS critical for tillers.
advisories.content_mr: First irrigation at Crown Root Initiation ~20-25 DAS critical for tillers.
advisories.source: ICAR-IIWBR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Check 20 plants/acre in whorl; act when 5% plants show fresh damage.
advisories.content_mr: Check 20 plants/acre in whorl; act when 5% plants show fresh damage.
advisories.source: ICAR FAW plan
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Dense canopy and dry mild weather favor powdery mildew; sulfur sprays early.
advisories.content_mr: Dense canopy and dry mild weather favor powdery mildew; sulfur sprays early.
advisories.source: ICAR-NRCG
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Inject fertilizers in middle third of irrigation cycle; flush lines.
advisories.content_mr: Inject fertilizers in middle third of irrigation cycle; flush lines.
advisories.source: PMKSY open guide
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: If OC <0.5% prioritize FYM/compost 5-10 t/ha before chemical N hike.
advisories.content_mr: If OC <0.5% prioritize FYM/compost 5-10 t/ha before chemical N hike.
advisories.source: Soil Health Card
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Desilt inlets before monsoon; maintain 1:1.5 side slopes for safety.
advisories.content_mr: Desilt inlets before monsoon; maintain 1:1.5 side slopes for safety.
advisories.source: PoCRA / MH agri
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Follow PHI; PPE; do not spray in high wind or within 48h of expected rain.
advisories.content_mr: Follow PHI; PPE; do not spray in high wind or within 48h of expected rain.
advisories.source: CIBRC public
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: ETL ~5% pods damaged; install bird perches 10-12/acre.
advisories.content_mr: ETL ~5% pods damaged; install bird perches 10-12/acre.
advisories.source: ICAR-IIPR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Apply gypsum at pegging for better pod filling and shelling %.
advisories.content_mr: Apply gypsum at pegging for better pod filling and shelling %.
advisories.source: ICAR-DGR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Propping and denavelling improve bunch quality; remove male bud.
advisories.content_mr: Propping and denavelling improve bunch quality; remove male bud.
advisories.source: ICAR-NRCB
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Monitor at panicle emergence; avoid heavy nitrogen before flowering.
advisories.content_mr: Monitor at panicle emergence; avoid heavy nitrogen before flowering.
advisories.source: ICAR-CISH
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Thrips surge in dry weather; mulch and avoid water stress.
advisories.content_mr: Thrips surge in dry weather; mulch and avoid water stress.
advisories.source: ICAR-IIVR
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: If evening RH >85% and temp 10-20C for 2 days, start protective spray.
advisories.content_mr: If evening RH >85% and temp 10-20C for 2 days, start protective spray.
advisories.source: ICAR-CPRI
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Compare mandi modal vs MSP; use eNAM for transparent lots when logistics allow.
advisories.content_mr: Compare mandi modal vs MSP; use eNAM for transparent lots when logistics allow.
advisories.source: eNAM/Agmarknet
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Millets tolerate short dry spells; prefer early sowing after onset rains.
advisories.content_mr: Millets tolerate short dry spells; prefer early sowing after onset rains.
advisories.source: ICAR millets
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Drip reduces foliar disease vs flood; schedule 1.0-1.2 ETc peak bulbing.
advisories.content_mr: Drip reduces foliar disease vs flood; schedule 1.0-1.2 ETc peak bulbing.
advisories.source: SAU irrigation
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Azadirachtin 1500-3000 ppm as part of rotation; not alone under high pest pressure.
advisories.content_mr: Azadirachtin 1500-3000 ppm as part of rotation; not alone under high pest pressure.
advisories.source: NIPHM open
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Uniform size, dry neck, free from purple blotch lesions for export packhouses.
advisories.content_mr: Uniform size, dry neck, free from purple blotch lesions for export packhouses.
advisories.source: APEDA open notes
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Hot water / fungicide sett treatment reduces red rot and smut carryover.
advisories.content_mr: Hot water / fungicide sett treatment reduces red rot and smut carryover.
advisories.source: ICAR-SBI
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: Keep spray, fertigation, and yield logs for KCC renewal and insurance claims.
advisories.content_mr: Keep spray, fertigation, and yield logs for KCC renewal and insurance claims.
advisories.source: NABARD advisory
advisories.license: Open educational compilation from public ICAR/SAU/gov advisories

advisories.content_en: For Cotton at sowing: monitor soil moisture, scout pests twice weekly, apply nutrients as per soil test, and record interventions. Prefer IPM and avoid calendar spraying.
advisories.content_mr: Cotton पिकाच्या sowing अवस्थेत ओलावा, कीड-रोग सर्वेक्षण, माती चाचणीनुसार अन्नद्रव्ये व IPM अवलंबा.
advisories.source: Compiled SAU package-of-practice style open knowledge

advisories.content_mr: Tomato पिकाच्या sowing अवस्थेत ओलावा, कीड-रोग सर्वेक्षण, माती चाचणीनुसार अन्नद्रव्ये व IPM अवलंबा.
advisories.source: Compiled SAU package-of-practice style open knowledge
